content.en:
"It's almost ripe!"

Ye Tian looked at the Heavenly Pole Fruit on the Heavenly Pole Tree, and his heart was slightly nervous.

Soon, the aromatic smell gradually dissipated, which meant that the Tianji Fruit was completely ripe.

Because once the Tianji Fruit is completely ripe, the aromatic breath will be recycled, and the slightest aromatic breath will not be revealed.

Boom Boom Boom !!

One creature after another rushed towards the Celestial Fruit and began a battle for the Celestial Fruit.

But at this moment, an eagle's cry resounded between the heavens and the earth.

Wow!

A huge divine eagle descended from the sky, tearing a powerful creature apart with a single claw, and the terrifying aura crushed the audience.

Puff puff puff!!

The Condor's wings slashed a large number of creatures one after another, showing its invincibility.

"This Condor, so strong!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply and exclaimed.

In terms of strength, he is naturally far from being the opponent of this divine eagle, and if he is against it, he will be killed in an instant.

"This Condor has the qualifications to fight with that stone mountain creature!"

Ye Tian commented.

Now that this divine eagle appeared, Ye Tian suppressed the idea of rushing forward in his heart, otherwise if he was targeted by this divine eagle, even if he had a sea of death flowers, he might not be able to escape.

"Wait!"

Ye Tian continued to hide his breath.

He believed that there were many creatures that wanted the Heavenly Pole Fruit, and that creatures comparable to this Condor definitely existed, because he had already sensed it with his Copying talent.

Rumble!!!!

A huge black snake emerged from the ground and attacked the Condor, preventing the Condor from snatching the Heavenly Fruit.

Then, a huge ape appeared with a stone stick in his hand, and each stick swept away, killing a large number of creatures.

Subsequently, a vine tree man creature also appeared, and countless vines strangled towards the ape.

In this way, these four creatures fought each other, and they didn't want each other to obtain the Heavenly Pole Fruit, and other creatures who wanted to rush to the Heavenly Pole Tree to plunder the Heavenly Pole Fruit were also bombarded by these four creatures.

Ye Tian remained hidden, pondering how to act.

In terms of strength, he is indeed not the opponent of these four major creatures, but it does not mean that he has no way to obtain the Heavenly Extreme Fruit.

"I'm no match for them, but they won't kill me with a single blow. As long as I take advantage of the gap between their battles, I can teleport over in an instant, snatch some Heavenly Extreme Fruits, and then leave, there should be hope to escape!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

Of course, he can't be too greedy, otherwise he will anger the four major creatures, and it will be really difficult to escape.

So, Ye Tian began to look for opportunities.

A few minutes later, he finally seized an opportunity, which was at the moment when the four major creatures collided with each other with all their might, and the four creatures were in the gap where they had just finished attacking and the next round of attacks had not yet begun.

Swish!

He teleported over and came to the foot of the Heavenly Pole Tree, and immediately picked the Heavenly Pole Fruit as fast as he could.

The four major creatures sensed that Ye Tian had picked the Heavenly Pole Fruit, and they all hit it with a blow, so they no longer cared about Ye Tian, but fought each other again.

After all, in their opinion, Ye Tian, a cosmic god ant, would not be able to withstand their attack at all, and would be annihilated in an instant.

A dead man, what is there to focus on?

However, Ye Tian defended with all his strength and transferred the damage to the Sea of Death Flowers.

Although the injury was transferred, Ye Tian was still injured, and it was only a minor injury.

"Hurry up and !!"

Ye Tian continued to pick the Heavenly Pole Fruit, not daring to delay time, and even used the time talent to pick more Heavenly Pole Fruit.

"Roar!!

The four major creatures finally reacted, seeing that Ye Tian was not dead, they also picked a lot of Heavenly Pole Fruits, and attacked Ye Tian one after another.

"Run!"

Ye Tian was not greedy at all, even if he still had a Heavenly Extreme Fruit in front of him, within reach, he gave up.

Whew!!

Ye Tian kept teleporting at the fastest speed, and even used his super god-level space-time talent to influence the four major creatures behind him to stop them from chasing and killing.

However, the strength of the four major creatures is indeed terrifying, and the shattered time and space are superimposed.

Ye Tian's body was bombarded again and again, if it weren't for his talent for transferring damage, he would have died a long time ago.

After withstanding many heavy blows, Ye Tian finally escaped far away, and the four major creatures did not really chase after him, after all, there were still many Heavenly Pole Fruits on the Heavenly Pole Tree, and he only picked a small part of them.

It is impossible for the four major beings to give up a large number of Heavenly Pole Fruits on the Heavenly Pole Tree for the sake of such a small amount of Heavenly Pole Fruit.

But Ye Tian was very cautious, and flew for a long time before finally landing in a forest and hiding.

......

"A total of 46 Heavenly Pole Fruits!"

Ye Tian counted for a moment, and then showed an excited smile.

Don't look at 46 is not much, but the Heavenly Pole Fruit is very precious, and from the mouth of the black panther, it is very difficult for a creature like him to grab a Heavenly Pole Fruit.

And the creatures that have obtained the Heavenly Extreme Fruit can all grow up quickly and become a powerhouse in the Origin Realm, that is, a Source King!

In the Origin Realm, all living beings are Source Beasts, and Source Beasts are divided into low-level Source Beasts, Intermediate Source Beasts, High-level Source Beasts, and Source Kings, Source Emperors, Source Emperors, and Source Ancestors.

That black panther was a high-level source beast, not very strong in the origin realm, but it was not a weak existence either.

According to the division of strength, although the physical body of this black panther far surpasses the powerhouses of the main space, its combat power is only the limit of the galaxy level.

And the Source King should be equivalent to the Cosmic God, the Source Emperor is equivalent to the Dominant, the Source Emperor is equivalent to the Heavenly Venerable, and the Source Ancestor is equivalent to the Supreme.

And this is a combat power that can be achieved just by relying on physical strength and talent, and you can see how terrifying it is when you think about it.

It's a pity that the wisdom of the source beast is not high, otherwise it can step into the true cultivation path, even if it is a source emperor, it is enough to crush the supreme.

"Whether the Heavenly Pole Fruit can assist in the cultivation of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique, we will know immediately!"

Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, swallowed a Heavenly Extreme Fruit in one gulp, and immediately began to cultivate.

He operated the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique and absorbed the energy of the Heavenly Pole Fruit.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying energy is running in the body, and the Chaos Golden Desolation is transforming to an incredible degree.

Ye Tian's Chaos Golden Desolate Technique had already reached the limit of the sixth layer, no matter how much he progressed, he could only make a slight progress, originally he just wanted to use this Heavenly Extreme Fruit to do an experiment, not really to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique.

But now, Ye Tian had a feeling.

It seems that the Heavenly Extreme Fruit can help him break the limit of the Chaos Golden Desolate Technique and leapfrog the seventh layer of the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique.

If this is the case, his accumulation at the cosmic god level will reach an unimaginably terrifying level.

"If one is not enough, use ten!"

Ye Tian swallowed ten Heavenly Extreme Fruits in one gulp, and he wanted to verify this possibility.
